desc.de: Cloud Contact Center. Voice, Chat, IVR, Recording, Analytics.
desc.en: Cloud contact center. Voice, chat, IVR, recording, analytics.

migration.de: **Kein OTC-Pendant.** Cloud Contact Center muss über Drittanbieter abgebildet werden: Genesys Cloud, Five9 oder Twilio Flex. **IVR-Logik.** Contact Flows komplett neu aufbauen — kein Migrations-Tool verfügbar. **NLU & Bots.** Amazon Connect Lex-Bots → externe NLU-Integration (Dialogflow, Rasa). Connect Wisdom → eigene Knowledge Base. **Sprachanalyse.** Contact Lens (Echtzeit-Analyse) → externe Speech-Analytics-Lösung anbinden. **Rufnummern.** Telefonnummern müssen portiert werden — Vorlaufzeit einplanen.
migration.en: **No OTC equivalent.** Cloud contact center must be covered by third-party solutions: Genesys Cloud, Five9, or Twilio Flex. **IVR logic.** Contact Flows must be rebuilt entirely — no migration tool available. **NLU & bots.** Amazon Connect Lex bots → external NLU integration (Dialogflow, Rasa). Connect Wisdom → custom knowledge base. **Speech analytics.** Contact Lens (real-time analysis) → integrate external speech analytics solution. **Phone numbers.** Phone numbers must be ported — plan for lead time.
